title: 1 Watt Flashlight - 120 Lumens
description:
1 Watt Flashlight with aluminum body, lanyard attachment and push button for power. Compact and featuring 120 lumens, this flashlight is perfect for home, office, automobiles, camping, and outdoor activities. It's lightweight and only 3.5 inches long, so you can easily store and use it when needed. You'll definitely want to have one of these handy during your next outdoor adventure. It makes for a great addition to your survival kit too and is useful in emergency situations.
